title: New Head of Corporate Affairs and Sustainability
When CEO transitions happen, the announcement message is just the beginning
summary:
Insights from Highwire’s new report on leadership change comms. When a CEO transition occurs, employees often do more than read the internal announcement. They’re also attuned to the public messages, like the press release or LinkedIn post. They can scrutinize these messages for what their leaders do and don’t say. On top of all of […]
